overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in dark robes walking through misty ancient stone ruins at dusk. The character travels along a cobblestone path past lit lanterns, through archways, and toward a distant village in a mountainous landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside cobblestone path approaching ancient ruins

events.description: character passes first lit iron lantern post, warm artificial light visible on right
entering stone archway ruins area as cliff face recedes

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the cobblestone path toward the ruins, passing a lit iron lantern

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff wall with sparse autumn vegetation
ancient weathered stone archway ruins in the misty distance
black iron lamp post with glowing warm yellow lantern
wet cobblestone pathway with moss between stones

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cliffside path made of wet cobblestones, with a tall rocky cliff on the left and ancient stone ruins visible ahead in the misty dusk. Passing a glowing iron lantern on the right, the character approaches the stone archway ruins as the cliff face gradually recedes.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient ruin courtyard with stone archways and water features

events.description: shallow water with lily pads appears alongside the path on the right
wooden structure with hanging lantern comes into view on the left, ruins begin to give way to open field

agents.ego_description: character walking through the stone archway ruins, passing between ancient weathered structures

entered.detail: large stone archway ruin with weathered blocks and moss
tall stone ruin with circular opening and broken walls
shallow water with lily pads alongside the path
wooden post with hanging square lantern and roof cover

segments.scene_description: Walking through the semi-enclosed stone ruins, the character passes beneath and between ancient archways on both sides. The path becomes wet with lily pads visible in the shallow water on the right. Toward the end of the segment, a wooden lantern structure appears on the left as the ruins begin to open up to the landscape beyond.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland path approaching distant village

events.description: passing the wooden lantern structure, warm light illuminates the left side briefly
distant village with lit windows becomes clearly visible in the misty valley ahead

agents.ego_description: character walking along dirt path through open grassland toward the distant settlement

entered.detail: settlement with glowing lit windows nestled in the misty valley
misty purple mountains forming the backdrop

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the ruins into a wide-open grassland, passing the wooden lantern structure on the left. The cobblestone path gives way to a dirt trail through tall grass. In the distance, a village with glowing windows becomes visible in the misty valley, set against a backdrop of purple mountains under the dusk sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, cliffside path through ancient ruins and into a wide, misty valley at dusk. It begins beside a towering rocky cliff on a wet cobblestone path, passing a glowing iron lantern as the character approaches a series of stone archways. As the camera moves through these semi-enclosed ruins, the terrain shifts to include shallow water with lily pads before passing a wooden lantern structure. The scene then opens up as the character emerges from the ruins, with the cobblestones giving way to a dirt trail through tall grassland. Finally, the view expands to reveal a distant village with glowing windows nestled in a valley beneath purple mountains under a dimming sky.
